title: Switch to containers/common for seccomp
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind cleanup

#### What this PR does / why we need it:
seccomp/containers-golang is deprecated and we should switch to
containers/common/pkg/seccomp instead.
#### How to verify it
Check if the CI passes.
#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

-->

<!--

None

Thanks for the bump @saschagrunert
